name: Cantirium: God Slayer
short_description: A colorful metroidvania in which you must help catgirl save a world on the brink of destruction, honing your exploration and combat skills in epic battles to challenge the gods themselves!
detailed_description:
Challenge the gods themselves

Centuries ago, all the deities known and unknown to science descended from heaven to earth, starting an apocalypse in which all people were destroyed, as well as other weak races. You have to find out the reason for this, as well as save the world - by destroying the cruel gods!

Extraordinary protagonist

A cat girl who woke up in the ice from a thousand-year sleep, lost her memory, but nevertheless wants to save this world from complete destruction and find out "who she is."

As the story progresses, the player receives a "halo", thanks to which new unique skills will gradually be unlocked, allowing you to climb into previously inaccessible places, or defeat stronger opponents.

Game features

  • Epic battles with the gods and much more
  • A unique living world that is interesting to explore
  • Colorful and minimalist fantasy pixel art.
  • Branchy dialogues with multiple choice answers
  • Non-linear story with multiple endings
  • Fascinating musical compositions written in a semi-classical style with an admixture of chiptune.

About the developer

My name is Gandrabura Boris and this game was completely created by just one person - me. At the moment I am 16 years old and I tried to put all my knowledge and soul into this project. Hope this inspires you!

supported_languages:
English*, Russian*, French*, German*, Spanish - Spain*, Simplified Chinese*, Portuguese - Portugal*, Turkish*, Japanese*
*languages with full audio support
